title: DAF Modernization Process Model
text:
The SAF/AQXP Strategic Change Management team has updated the MPM to version 26.01.13. This version of the model includes three new best practices/lessons learned documents and has had several AMIC processes updated to point to their new PowerApp Playbook when referencing various figures. In addition, the MPM has a new version numbering format which will follow a format of YY.MM.DD so users will always know when the last time the model was updated. If you have have any questions, comments, or suggestions please reach out to us using the the Contact Us page.
Continue Reading
To clear up some ambiguity with the Acquisition Plan on the Services Pathway and the Acquisition Plan on the AMIC pages, the SAF/AQXP SCM team has split the input/output in two. The “Acq Plan” on the AMIC page has been updated to have the template “AMIC Acquisition Plan Template and Samples” associated with it. This template is AMIC specific.
Continue Reading
The SAF/AQXP Strategic Change Management Team has updated the DAF Modernization Process Model (MPM) to version 15.3. This version includes multiple new reference documents additions and many updates to the AMIC processes that were added in the previous version. For a full list of new reference documents refer to the Document Changes page. If you have any questions, comments, or recommendations please refer to the Contact Us page.
Continue Reading
The Strategic Change Management Team has updated the DAF Modernization Process Model to version 15.2. This version includes the inclusion of the Acquisition Management and Integration Center (AMIC) processes as a new specialized view and changes to DoDI 5000.73 & DoDI 5000.80. For a full list of changes, you can refer to the Document Changes page. If you have recommendations, questions, or concerns, please reach out through the Contact Us page.
Continue Reading
